mustPass: home route and contact route are included
all default routes have matching sectionsPerRoute entries
routes and section ids use kebab-case slugs
route paths are Swedish, lowercase, start with '/' and have no trailing slash
page set reflects this industry's need to explain services, recurring agreements and contact intake
recommended dossiers only use allowed ids
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic brochure structure that omits service details specific to property support or green area maintenance
invented certifications, guarantees, team size or customer counts
vague service labels without examples of actual tasks
forcing booking flows that do not fit quote-based or agreement-based services
duplicating the same trust proof content on every page
